name: Quick Crab Cakes
recipeInstructions:
Old Bay Seasoning is a prepared blend of celery salt, spices, and paprika; look for it where spices are located.
Per Serving: 246 Calories, 27g Protein, 11g Fat, 7g Carbohydrates, 525mg Sodium
In a large bowl, combine crushed crackers and the next five ingredients. With fingers, pick through crabmeat to remove any shells. Place crabmeat in the bowl with the cracker mixture; gently fold everything together using a rubber spatula. Form into 4 patties. Spray a large skillet with non-stick cooking spray; heat over medium heat. Add patties and cook until browned for 12-15 minutes.
